expected_progress.description: Missing-contact records should either decrease or be marked for research.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: All unresolved contacts require manual research or external lookup.

expected_progress.description: Resolvable non-Shopify domains should gain candidate emails.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: Remaining targets are myshopify.com subdomains or need manual research.

expected_progress.description: Eligible records with emails should receive subject/body.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: No eligible records or product boundary blocked generation.

expected_progress.description: Valid generated messages should become ready for approval.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: No generated messages or validation failed safely.

expected_progress.description: Approved messages should become ready to send.
Approved sends should be added to the send ledger.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: No approved messages not already in the ledger.

expected_progress.description: Pending ledger entries should be sent via SMTP.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: SMTP not ready, dry run only, or high-risk approval missing.

expected_progress.description: Sent messages should be checked for replies.
Detected replies should receive intent classification.
Actionable interpreted replies should create response drafts for approval.
Due follow-ups should create approval queue drafts.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: No sent messages are due for follow-up.

expected_progress.description: Revenue truth should refresh current bottleneck and next action state.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: Revenue state was already current or no actionable state change exists.

expected_progress.description: Publicly discovered emails should reduce contact_needed; unresolved records should be reclassified with a specific reason.

contracts.acceptable_no_progress_reason: No public email was found, or remaining records require a storefront domain or manual research.
